PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Dec-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Walker for Antionette Conde. Claudia Choy for William Conde.

The Court stated that this was a small estate and encuoraged Counsel to get together and try to work it out. The Parties raised issues regarding the validity of the will and jurisdiction. The matter was continued to December 1, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
